name: StreamHOI: Interaction-aware Temporal Memory Adaptation for Streaming HOI Video Generation
summary: arXiv:2607.20174v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: Existing human--object interaction (HOI) video generation methods are largely limited to offline short-video generation with complex driving condit...
description: arXiv:2607.20174v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: Existing human--object interaction (HOI) video generation methods are largely limited to offline short-video generation with complex driving conditions, making them unsuitable for real-time interactive applications. We present \emph{StreamHOI}, a low-latency streaming framework for long-duration HOI video generation. Instead of converting heavil...
author: Zejing Rao, Haoxian Zhang, Xiaoqiang Liu, Yiping Meng, Guoxin Zhang, Pengfei Wan, Fan Tang, Tong-Yee Lee
